raw_text: ABELL, Sir Anthony, K.C.M.G. (1952), C.M.G.—b. 1906; ed. Repton and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; cadet, Nig., 1929; admin. offr., cl. II, 1946; cl. I, 1948; gov. and c.in-c., Sarawak, 1950-59; regl. offr. o/seas servs. resettlement bureau, 1961.

ABRAHAM, A. A., I.S.O. (1961).—b. 1912; ed. St. Stanislaus Coll., B. Guiana; cler. asst., B. Guiana, 1929; D.O., 1945; estab. offr., 1947; prin. asst. sec., 1953; ch. estab. offr., mem. publ. serv. commn., 1955; gov't. sec. and clk., ex. co., 1960; perm. sec., 1963.

ABRAHAM, A. L., O.B.E. (1964), M.V.O. (1954), O.St.J., Q.P.M. (1957), C.P.M.—b. 1908; ed. Southend High Sch.; police, Pal., 1930; supt., Barb., 1938; Fiji, 1944; B. Hond., 1950; commn. police, Gib., 1953; chief of police, B.S.I.P., 1960-63.
ABRAHAM, R. H.—b. 1928; ed. Royal Coll., Maur., and Woolwich Poly., Lond.; o/seer, gr. II, Maur., 1950; inspr., gr. I, 1955; exec. engnr., 1959.
ABRAHAMS, A. R., C.M.G. (1962).—b. 1908; ed. J'ca Coll.; apptd. J'ca, 1927; pensions offr., 1944; asst. sec., 1950; prin., 1952; perm. sec., min. of comms. and wks., 1954. (J'ca Govt. service.)

ABRAHAMS, H. A.—b. 1906; ed. Calabar High Sch., J'ca.; asst., constab., J'ca., 1923; 2nd cl. clk., constab., 1933; 1st cl. clk., med. dept., 1939; examr., accnts., audit dept., 1944; acctnt., dept. of agric., 1948; senr. acctnt., 1950; admin. sec., med. dept., 1952; man., govt. savings bank, 1955; prin. asst. sec., 1955. (J'ca Govt. service.)
ABRAMS, P. D.—b. 1921; ed. Kitale Sch. and Prince of Wales Sch., Ken., and Merton Coll., Oxford; admin. cadet, Ken., 1946; dist. offr., 1948. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ACHESON, D. R.—b. 1928; ed. Michaelhouse Sch., S.A. and Rhodes Univ. Coll.; cadet, N. Rhod., 1950; dist. offr., 1952.
ADAMS, A. B.—b. 1899; ed. Wolmer's Sch., J'ca, London and Illinois Univs.; senr. master, tech. sch., San Fernando, Trin., 1954; prin., 1955. (T'dad Govt. service.)
ADAMS, C. W.—b. 1920; ed. Public Schs., and Melbourne Tech. Coll.; mil. serv., 1940-46; wireless offr., G. & E.I.C., 1949; chief wireless offr., 1953.
ADAMS, G. W.—b. 1924; ed. Broughton Sec. Sch., Edin.; mil. serv., 1943-46; Br. P.O., 1941-56; E.A.P. & T. admin., serv. and sales supt., 1956; asst. tele. contlr., 1958; senr. asst. 1961.
ADAMS, H. L., C.M.G. (1961), T.D.—b. 1910; ed. Haileybury; mil. serv., 1939-45, lt.-col.; cadet, Ken., 1946; sec., comrce. and industry, 1949; econ. sec., E.A.C.S.O., 1954; chief admin. sec., 1959.

ADAMS, J. E. M.—b. 1923; ed. Modern High Sch., B. Guiana; clk., P.O., B. Guiana, 1943; asst. inspr., labr., 1949; inspr., labr., 1953; labr. cmsgnr., B. Hond., 1957; dep. cmsgnr., labr., B. Guiana, 1960.

ADAMS, J. McP.—b. 1918; ed. Cranbrook Sch., Sydney, St. Peter's Coll., Adelaide, Gonville and Caius Coll., Camb.; barrister-at-law, Inner Temple; a/asst. div. food offr., M.O.F., Camb.; high ct. prosecr. and mil. govt. prosecr., Control Commsn., Germany; cr. couns., Nig., 1951; Sar., 1956; secon. dep. legal advr. Brunei, 1957-59; legal dftsmn., E. Nig., 1960; Swaz., 1961.
ADAMS, M. J.—b. 1918; cadet Nig. 1947; admin. offr. 1950; dist. offr. N. Rhod. 1950; secon. office of cmsgnr. for N. Rhod. 1959; senr. D.O. gr. II., 1961; gr. I., 1962.

ADAMS, M. W.—b. 1929; ed. Ranelagh Gram. Sch., and City Lond. Coll.; mil. serv. 1947-49, R.A.F., rad. mech.; acctnt. Nig. Coll. Arts, Sc. and Techn., 1952; audtr. Ken., 1957; sen. audtr. G. & E.I.C., 1960.
ADAMS, R. K.—b. 1911; asst. registr., co-op. socs., S.L., 1939; Nig., 1946; S.L., 1950; co-op. dev. expert, Gam., 1961; Aden, 1963.
ADAMS, R. T.—b. 1914; ed. Lowestoft Gram. Sch., and King's Coll., London; mil. serv., 1940-46, capt.; educ. offr., Tang., 1949; senr. educ. offr., 1959-63. (Tang. Govt. service.)
ADAMSON, A. R.—b. 1916; ed. Queen's Royal Coll., Trin., and Portsmouth Municipal Coll.; exec. engnr., Trin., 1947; asst. D.P.W., B. Guiana, 1958; chief engnr. (roads), 1958.
ADAMSON, G. A. G., M.B.E.—b. 1906; mil. serv., 1940-41; game ranger, Ken., 1939; senr. game warden, 1955. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ADAMSON, J. C. M.—b. 1910; ed. Indville Coll., Edinburgh; temp. storekpr., S.L., 1944; stock verifier, 1949; storekpr. gr. I., 1953; ch. storekpr., 1961. (S.L. Govt. service.)

ADDI, M.—b. 1917; ed. Bishop Gobat Sch., Jerusalem; posts and tels. depts., Pal., 1936-48; Pal. accnts. clearance office, Cyp., 1948-49; C.O., 1949-50; asst. postmaster, Nyasa., 1950; asst. acctnt., 1952; acctnt., 1955; secon., Fed. of Rhod. and Nyasa., 1954-56; acctnt., posts and tels., dept., N. Borneo, 1957; sen. postal acctnt., P.O., H.K., 1959; ch. postal acctnt., 1962.

ADDISON, W. R. L., M.B.E. (1956), M.C.—b. 1919; ed. Haileybury Coll. and Queen's Coll., Oxford; mil. serv., 1939-46, maj.; cadet, Uganda, 1948; A.D.O., 1950; asst. sec., E.A.C.S.O., 1952; clk., cent. leg. assembly, 1951-55; asst. sec., Ken., 1957; under sec. (fin. and estab.) min. of agric., 1959-63. (Ken. Govt. service.)

ADIE, J. J., C.M.G. (1962), Brill. Star of Zanz. (4th cl. (1947)—b. 1913; ed. Kingsland Grange Prep. Sch., Shrewsbury Sch. and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; mil. serv., 1940-42 (K.A.R. and O.E.T.A.); admin. offr., Zanz., 1937; asst. dist. cmsgnr., Pemba, 1938; Zanz., 1939; p.s. to Br. Res., 1939-40; asst. sec., 1942; senr. asst. sec. and p.s. to H.H. the Sultan, 1946; secon. C.O., 1949; sec. educ., labr. and lands, Ken., 1952; chief sec., Barb., 1957; perm. sec., Ken., 1958-63; temp. prin., D.T.C., 1964.

ADJIRACKOR, T. A.—b. 1914; ed. Adisadel Coll., G.C.; police constable, G.C., 1933; corporal, 1940; sgt., 1942; sub-inspr., 1946; inspr. gr. II., 1949; asst. supt., 1950; supt., 1957; sen. supt., 1958; asst. cmsgnr., police, 1959. (Ghana civil service.)
ADSHEAD, J. W.—b. 1923; ed. Tettenhall Coll., Staffs., Blundell's Sch. and Birmingham Univ.; mil. serv., 1942-47; senr. auditor, N.Nig., 1958; prin. auditor, Gam., 1960; redesig. dir. audit, 1963.
AERS, I. B.—b. 1921; ed. Dulwich Coll., Sandhurst; mil. serv., 1939-48, major (desps.); cadet Tang., 1948; dist. offr., 1950; Swaz., 1963.
AGIUS FERRANTE, A.—b. 1918; ed. Lyceum, and Royal Univ., Malta, and London Sch. of Econ.; cler. asst., Malta, 1937; admin. civil serv., 1939; asst. comsnr., inland rev., 1958.

AGOSTINI, C.—b. 1914; ed. St. Mary's Coll., Trin.; control offr., Trin., 1941; dep. aerodrome supt., 1946; dir. of civil aviation, and aerodrome supt., 1947; loaned to I.C.A.O., civ. aviation, Dominican Republic, 1956-57. (T'dad Govt. service.)

AGOSTINI, J. E.—b. 1906; ed. St. Mary's Coll., Trin.; cler. aspts., govt. depts., Trin., 1924-44; senr. clk., acctnt-gen's. dept., 1945; police (immig.), 1947; prin. offr., 1949; asst. ch. immig. offr., 1952; dep. ch. immig. offr., 1954; ch. immig. offr. (redesig.), 1958. (T'dad Govt. service.)
AHMED, A. A., M.B.E. (1963).—b. 1917; ed. Sec. Sch., Aden and Kingston Tech. Coll., Lond.; clk., sec't, Aden, 1942; asst. income tax offr., 1952; asst. sec., 1956; clk. leg. co., 1960.
AHMED, M. H. C.—b. 1913; prob. labr. inspr., Maur., 1938; labr. inspr., 1940; labr. field offr., 1946; asst. labr. comsnr., 1950; redesig. sen. labr. offr.
AIKEN, D. F.—b. 1927; ed. Stanley Tech. Sch., S. Norwood, Lond.; mil. serv., 1944-47, Parachute Regt., pte.; dental mech., Uga., 1952; senr. dental techn. (i/c trng.), 1961. (Uga. Govt. service.)

AINLEY, Sir John, Kt. (1957), M.C.—b. 1906; ed. St. Bees Sch. and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; barrister-at-law, Gray's Inn; mil. serv., 1939-45, maj.; dist. mag., G.C., 1935; cr. coun., 1936; puisne judge, Uga., 1946; ch. just., E. Nig., 1955; S'wak. N. Borneo and Brunei, 1959; Ken., 1962. (Ken. Govt. service.)
AINLEY, J. M.—b. 1925; ed. Huddersfield Coll. Sch., Bridlington Gram. Sch. and Yorks. Inst. of Agric.; field offr., agric., Tang., 1949; agric. offr., 1958. (Tang. Govt. service.)
AINSWORTH, T. M.—b. 1920; ed. Hyde Gram. Sch.; admin. offr., 1948; secon., Mal., 1951-54; admin. offr., Sarawak, 1956; secon., Brunei, 1958; dist. offr., S'wak., 1959-63.

AITCHISON, G. L.—b. 1920; ed. Cathedral Boys Sch., Shanghai, St. Albans Sch., and Selwyn Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1941-46, major; admin. cadet, Nig., 1947; district offr., 1952. (Nig. Govt. service.)
AITKEN, I. H.—b. 1919; ed. Greenock High Sch. and St. Andrews Univ.; tax assessor, Ken., 1944; senr. immig. offr., 1948; dep. prin. immig. offr., 1952. (Ken. Govt. service.)

AITKEN, Maj. R., O.B.E. (1963).—b. 1910; ed. Gregg Comm. Coll., Ipswich; mil. serv., 1939-46, major; H.M. prison service, 1936; secon. supt., prisons, B. Hond., 1946; resig.; N.Z. prisons serv., 1947; re-appointed supt., prisons, B. Hond., 1949; dep. dir. of prisons, J'ca, 1951; dir., prisons, B. Guiana, 1955.
AITKEN, W. G.—b. 1923; ed. Glasgow High Sch. and Glasgow Univ.; mil. serv., 1942-45, lieut.; geologist, Tang., 1947; dir., geol. surv., Nyasa., 1959-63.
AKEROYD, A.—b. 1911; ed. St. Luke's Sch. and Cockburn High Sch., Leeds; asst. civ. engr., Admirty., 1943; civ. engr. 1945; archt. N. Rhod., 1947; senr. archt., 1955; dep. dir. wks. 1961.
AKIM, N. B.—b. 1924; ed. Makerere Coll., Uga.; asst. M.O., Tang., 1948; M.O., 1958. (Tang. Govt. service.)

AKKER, M. K., O.B.E. (1961), C.P.M. (1957).—b. 1919; ed. St. Lawrence Coll.; Uga., police, 1938; Zanz., 1950; supt., Ken., 1954; senr. supt., 1955; asst. comsnr., 1959; senr. asst. comsnr., 1961-63. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ALBAN, R. G. W. E.—b. 1899; ed. Berkhamsted Sch.; mil. serv., 1918-1927; lt.-col.; Indian political serv., 1927-1947; comsnr., Kamaran I., Aden, 1952.
ALBURY, F. C. W.—b. 1904; ed. privately; wireless operator, Bah., 1918; sec., bd. of agric., 1924; senr. agric. offr., 1954; dep. dir., agric., 1957.
ALBURY, K. H. E.—b. 1920; ed. Govt. High Sch., Nassau; clk., public treasy., Bah., 1940; asst. audr., 1950; audr., 1956.

ALCANTARA, J. E.—b. 1926; ed. Christian Bros. Coll., Gib., Univ. Coll., Lond.; Linc. Inn., 1946; mem. city coun., 1954-56; mem. leg. coun. 1954-57; regsr. sup. ct., 1957; judge ct. of first inst. and stip. mag., 1963.
ALCINDOR, E. G., C.P.M. (1953).—b. 1913; asst. supt. police, Trin., 1951; supt., 1958; senr. supt., 1963. (Trin. Govt. service.)

ALCINDOR, F.—b. 1909; ed. Ideal High Sch., Trin.; barrister-at-law; apptd. Trin., 1933; clk., magistracy, 1940-49; senr. clk., 1949; assessor, inland rev., 1954; magistracy, 1954. (T'dad Govt. service.)

ALDEN, J. W., M.B.E. (1945).—b. 1916; ed. Sloane Sch., Chelsea; mil. serv., 1939-46; rev. clk., Ken., 1946; rev. offr., 1947; tax offr., E.A.C.S.O., 1950; immigr. offr., Uga., 1952; senr., 1962. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ALDERDICE, A. A.—b. 1912; ed. Sydney Gram. Sch., Univ. of Sydney, and London Hosp.; mil. serv., 1940-45; lt.-col.; M.O., gr. I, Trin., 1947; med. supt., Uga., 1950; senr. specialist and med. supt., 1954. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ALDOUS, L. W.—b. 1913; ed. Stationers' Co. Sch., and L.S.E., London Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-45, capt.; F.O. (German section) control comsnr. for Germany, 1946-49; devel. asst., Uga., 1952; asst. sec., 1954; senr. asst. sec., 1955; under sec., 1958; sec., E.A.C.S.O., 1960; princ. econ. offr.
ALDOUS, P. E.—b. 1918; ed. New Plymouth High Sch. and Victoria Univ. Coll., N.Z.; mil. serv., 1939—44 (N.Z.A.) capt.; cadet, N. Rhod., 1949; dist. offr., 1951; senr. D.O., gr. II, 1964.
ALEONG, R. V. S.—b. 1911; ed. Queen's Royal Coll., Trin., Faraday Hse. Elec. Engrng. Coll., London; chief electrical inspector, Trin., 1950. (T'dad Govt. service.)
ALEONG, R. W.—b. 1916; ed. Queen's Royal Coll., Trin., and Royal Coll. of Science, London; asst. gov't. chemist, Trin., 1952; dep. gov't. chemist, 1957. (T'dad Govt. service.)

ALEXANDER, D. A. R., C.B.E. (1963)—b. 1920; ed. St. Mary's Coll., St. Lucia, and Univ. Coll., London; barrister-at-law, Middle Temple; dep. clk. of courts, J'ca, 1944; mag., Turks and Caicos Is., 1947; clk. of courts, J'ca, 1949; asst. legal dtsmsnr., 1951; legal dtsmsnr., 1955; W. Nig., 1957; solr.-gen. (Nig. Govt. service.)

ALEXANDER, D. R. W., M.B.E.(Mil.)—b. 1918; ed. Montrose Academy and Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-46, lt. col.; admin. cadet, Nig., 1946; resig. 1947; reapp. admin. offr., gr. III, Som., 1948; gr. II, 1948; secon. Cyrenaica, 1948-53; gr. I, chief sec., min. of interior, 1951; cadet offr. cl. II, H. K., 1953; ch. asst. soc. wel. and asst. sec. Chinese affrs. 1954; comsnr., E.S.C. and ch. staff offr. C.A.S., 1956; asst. D.U.S., 1958; admin. offr., staff gr. C, 1959; chmn. U.C., 1960; mem. leg. co., 1960; asst. dir. soc. welf., 1962; dep. comsnr. labr. and mines, 1963.
ALEXANDER, J.—b. 1909; ed. Aberdeen Gram. Sch. and Aberdeen Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-45, W.S./capt., R.E.; engrn., H. K., 1949; asst. chief engrn., 1957; chief engrn., 1958; asst. D.P.W., 1961.

ALEXANDER, J. B.—b. 1912; ed. Tiffin Boys' Sch., Kingston-on-Thames, Imp. Coll. of Science and Tech., London Univ. and California Inst. of Tech., U.S.A.; interned, 1942-45; geologist, Nyasa., 1935; F.M.S., 1939; prin. geol., Fed. of Mal., 1950; dep. dir., geol. survey, 1957.
ALEXANDER, W. H.—b. 1907; ed. Wolmer's Sch., J'ca; barrister-at-law; apptd. J'ca, 1927; dep. clk., 1939; clk. of courts, 1947; crown coun., 1950; senr., 1955; resdt. mag., 1955. (J'ca Govt. service.)
ALEXIS, F. C.—b. 1913; ed. Grenada Boys' Secondary Sch. and Royal Coll. of Surgeons, Edin.; dist. med. offr., St. V., 1935; supt. physician, col. hosp., Grenada, 1952; S.M.O., 1955.

ALFORD, Sir Robert, K.B.E., C.M.G.—b. 1904; ed. Winchester and Univ. Coll., Oxford; nav. serv., 1940-45; cadet, Nig., 1928; asst. dist. offr., 1931; dist. offr. (clk., exec. and leg. couns.), 1938; senr. dist. offr., 1946; fin. sec., Zanz., 1947; ch. sec., 1952; gov. and c.-in-c., St. Helena, 1958-62.
ALI, Ayub, O.B.E. (1956), M.B.E.—b. 1907; ed. Govt. Indian Sch., Nairobi; clk., sect., Ken., 1920; asst. estab. offr., 1944; estab. offr., 1948; asst. sec. (estab.), 1955. (Ken. Govt. service.)

ALLAN, A. J., Q.P.M. (1963), C.P.M. (1954).—b. 1920; ed. Boroughmuir High Sch., Edin.; mil. serv., 1939-42; asst. insp., police, Ken., 1942; asst. supt., 1948; supt., 1952; senr. supt., 1954; asst. comsnr., 1960. (Ken. Govt. service.)

ALLAN, A. S., M.B.E.(Mil.) (1943)—b. 1914; ed. Stonyhurst and Univ. of Rennes, France; mil. serv., 1939-46, major; cadet, Tang., 1950; dist. offr., 1952; asst. sec., Ken., 1953; dist. offr., Tang., 1955; estab. offr., 1955; prin. asst. sec., 1959-61; dep. ch. sec. Maur, 1962.

ALLAN, C. H., O.B.E. (1959)—b. 1921; ed. Hamilton High Sch., Canterbury Univ. Coll., N.Z., and Camb. Univ.; mil. serv., 1942-44; cadet, B.S.I.P., 1945; admin. offr., cl. B., 1949; secon. spec. lands comsnr., 1954; cl. A., 1955; senr. asst. sec., W. Pac. H.C., 1957; secon. N. Hebs., 1958.
ALLAN, D. A. G., M.C.—b. 1918; ed. Geo. Watson's Coll., Edin., and Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-47; exec. engrn., Ken., 1948; senr. exec. engrn., Nyasa., 1956; ch. planng. engrn., 1962.

ALLAN, J. A.—b. 1910; ed. Glasgow Univ. and W. of Scotland Agric. Coll.; lectr., Barb., 1936; tech. offr., Nat. Inst. of Agric. Botany, Camb., 1944; supt., agric., Cyprus, 1945; pasture research offr., Ken., 1947; agric. offr., N. Rhod., 1949.

ALLAN, J. A. B.—b. 1911; ed. Douai Sch.; mil. serv., 1940-48 (desps.), lt.-col.; supt., prisons, Mal., 1948; senr. supt., Uga., 1956; dep. comsnr., prisons, 1958; comsnr. prisons, Ken., 1961. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ALLAN, T. G.—b. 1927; ed. Moray Hse., Royal High and Borough Muir Schs. Edin. Univ.; mil. serv. 1945-48; assr. consvr. forests, Fiji, 1951; N. Rhod. 1958.
ALLAN, W. G. L.—b. 1923; ed. Trinity Coll., Glenalmond, and Aberdeen Univ.; M.O. Tang., 1951; M.O. Hong Kong, 1954; snr. med. and health offr., 1959; prin. M. & H.O., 1963.

ALLEN, C. P. S., C.M.G. (1963), M.V.O., O.B.E. (1959)—b. 1917; ed. Wanganui Collegiate Sch., N.Z., and Gonville and Caius Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1940-43, K.A.R.; admin. cadet, Uga., 1940; asst. D.O., 1942; asst. chief sec., 1953; perm. sec. for security and external rels., 1955; secon., Br. embassy, Washington, 1956-57; secon., supvr., elections, Uga., 1958, and Royal tour dir., 1958-59; admin. sec., 1960; perm. sec., ch. min. off., 1961; perm. sec., P.M., off., sec., cab., and hd. Uga. civil serv., 1962-63. (Uga. Govt. service.)
ALLEN, E. W.—b. 1917; ed. London Univ.; mil. serv., 1941-46, major; educ. offr., N. Nig., 1947; senr. educ. offr., 1956; prin., teacher training coll., 1956. (Nig. Govt. service.)

ALLEN, R. L.—b. 1914; ed. Coombe Down C. of E. Sch. and Bath Tech. Coll.; Br. P.O. 1942-47; Sudan govt. posts and tels. dept., 1945; E.A. posts and tels. dept., techn., gr. I, 1947; inspgr. techn., 1949; supvg. techn., 1954; senr. asst. engrnr., 1955; senr. sect. engrnr., 1962.
ALLEN, S. J. H.—b. 1927; ed. Ardingly Coll.; Pal. police, 1946-48; survr., D.O.S., 1949; staff survr., S. Leone, 1956; asst. dir., survey, 1960. (S.L. Govt. service.)
ALLEYNE, C. G.—b. 1923; ed. Combermere Sch., Barb.; clk. 1942; inspr. of income tax, 1945; stats. clk. 1955; stats. asst., 1956; asst. govt. stat., 1961.
ALLINSON, W. C.—b. 1920; ed. Bede Collegiate Boys Sch., Sunderland; port offr., E.A.R. & H., 1951; pilot, 1952.

ALLISON, J. A., O.B.E.—b. 1915; ed. St. John's Coll., Jo'burg, and Witwatersrand Univ.; mil. serv., 1940-46, major; admin. offr., cl. IV, Nig., 1938; D.O., 1946; Bech. Prot., 1950; high comsmr's office, 1950-51; senr. D.O., fin. sec., 1958; admin. sec., 1962.

ALLPRESS, P. L.—b. 1921; ed. Beaumont Coll. and Sidney Sussex Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1941-42, 2nd lieut.; cadet, Nig., 1942; admin. offr., cl. II, E. Nig., 1955; cl. I, 1958; perm. sec., 1958; ret., 1959; apptd. plebiscite comsnr., S. Cams., 1960.

ALLSEBROOK, G. P.—b. 1918; ed. Stowe Sch., Kent Sch., Conn., U.S.A. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; barrister-at-law, Middle Temple; mil. serv., 1939-43, capt.; cadet, Tang., 1940; D.O., 1942; admin. offr., cl. IIB, 1958; secon., admnr., Virgin Is., 1956-59; dep. prov. comsnr. Tang., 1960; admin. offr., cl. IIA, 1961; admin. sec., 1962. (Tang. Govt. service.)

ALLWRIGHT, W. C.—b. 1915; ed. Rutlish Sch., Merton, and King's Coll. Hosp.; Univ. of London; mil. serv., 1940-46, sqdn. ldr.; dental surg., H.K., 1947; senr., 1949; redesig. dental specialist, 1951; senr. dental spec., 1959; H.K. rep. at W.H.O. dental health seminar, N.Z., 1954.
ALMAN, J. H.—b. 1919; ed. Chester Coll., Birkenhead, and L'pool Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-46, major (desps.); educ. offr., Mal., 1946; prin., Kent teachers train. coll., N. Borneo, 1953.
ALP, W. C.—b. 1907; ed. Christ's Hosp. and London Univ.; mil. serv., 1940-45; archt., P.W.D., Ken., 1948. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ALTORFER, A.—b. 1915; ed. Calday Grange Gram. Sch.; mil. serv. 1940-46; prin. local govt. inspr., Ken., 1950; dep. sec., min. local govt., 1962. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ALURKAR, G. K.—b. 1920; ed. Fergusson Coll., Poona, and Med. Colls., Poona and Bombay; asst. surgeon, Tang., 1949; sen. asst. surgeon, 1954; M.O., 1956. (Tang. Govt. service.)
ALVARES, R. E.—b. 1909; ed. St. Joseph's Coll., H.K. and H.K. Univ.; asst. pathologist, H.K., 1939; pathologist, 1951; spec. (govt. pathol.), 1957.
ALVES, J. V.—b. 1915; ed. St. Vincent Gram. Sch.; clk. 1938; sec. control dept., 1944; inc. tax inspr., 1951; publ. rel. and loc. govt. offr., 1956; princ. sec. chief min. off., 1960.
AMAR, G. S.—b. 1912; ed. Punjab Univ.; asst. master, Ken., 1942; educ. offr. (Asian), 1947; senr., 1949; asst. dir., educ., 1960. (Ken. Govt. service.)

AMATO-GAUCI, F. E., M.B.E. (mil.) (1945)—b. 1917; ed. St. John Academy and Royal Univ. of Malta; mil. serv., 1939-45, maj.; civ. serv. (admin.), Malta, 1936; prin. offr., 1948; dir. of labr., 1949; dir., labr. and soc. welf., 1955; dir., emig., labr. and soc. welf., 1956; under sec., 1959.
AMATO GAUCI, J.—b. 1909; ed. Lyceum, Malta; apptd. admin. civil serv., Malta, 1930; principal offr., 1950; chief exec. offr., agric., 1958.
AMBROSE, H. B.—b. 1924; ed. Aldenham Sch., Wye Coll., London Univ., and Christ's Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1942-46, R.M.; agric. offr. (exper.), Ken., 1950; agric. research offr., Nyasa., 1957.
AMBROSE, J.—b. 1914; ed. Wade Deacon Gram Sch., Widnes; mil. serv., 1935-45, sgt. (desps.); chargeman mech., Tang., 1950; inspr. mech., 1952; ch. inspr. mech., 1963. (Tang. Govt. service.)

AMBROSE, J. W. D.—b. 1909; ed.
